---
title: "Assignment_B1"
author: "Nick_30656230"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This document contains the R code to retrieve data from the NCBI database using the accession number WGL30888.1. The following files are therefore geenrated:

i. GenBank flatfile (.gb)
ii.Sequence (.fasta)
iii.Metadata (.csv)
iv.All metadata along with all parsed source qualifiers (.json). 


```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
